title: The Witch's Broom
description: This project added the witch's broom and two pieces of equipment.
body: This mod adds 3 new items: Witch's Broom, Witch's Robe, and Witch's Hat. The crafting recipes are shown in the pictures. Note that players riding the broom cannot reach full speed unless they are wearing the mod's equipment. Also, please note that the author of this mod is not the original creator but has received authorization from the original author to port this version. You can search for Majo's Broom on CurseForge.![Witch's Broom Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d984969ad69fa64ff35c676cf86796ad8bfc96d3.png)![Witch's Hat Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3d0d1c2afa249a06d969a6738383b240e13b6c8.png)![Witch's Robe Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca387bec917f7456abc133e6851e39e1d891b004.png)
